hero.heading: Own Your Blog
hero.subheading: A local-first flat-file CMS that turns markdown files into fast, beautiful, SEO-optimized blogs

features.subtext: Your content lives as simple Markdown files. Pages and posts are just folders. Add images, documents and publish instantly — no database required.
No plugins. No complex setup. No endless configuration screens. Start writing and your blog is ready.
No database to maintain, no plugin updates to worry about, and a drastically smaller attack surface.
No vendor lock-in. Your blog is just files you control, so your content stays fully portable and under your ownership.
WebNami generates static sites that load instantly. No heavy runtimes, no slow queries — just clean, blazing-fast pages.
Essential SEO features are built in from the start — structured metadata, clean URLs, and optimized markup.

workflow.title: From Markdown to Live Site in Minutes
steps: Create your blog with one command
